requirement_topic.en: Authorized Ecuadorian Importer / Local Representative — RUC/SRI Registration and Spanish Labelling
requirement_topic.zh: 授权厄瓜多尔进口商/当地代表——RUC/SRI注册及西班牙语标注
requirement_topic.zht: 授權厄瓜多進口商/當地代表——RUC/SRI登記及西班牙語標注

summary.en: To import and sell wireless or telecom terminal equipment in Ecuador, a legally established Ecuadorian entity registered with SRI (Servicio de Rentas Internas) under a RUC (Registro Único de Contribuyentes) tax registration number is required. This authorized Ecuadorian importer or local representative must sign the ARCOTEL homologación application dossier and take legal responsibility for product compliance in Ecuador. All devices sold in Ecuador must carry Spanish-language labels; the ARCOTEL homologación certificate number must appear on the product label or packaging. Labels must identify the product model, manufacturer or importer, country of origin, and ARCOTEL approval number. SENAE (Servicio Nacional de Aduana del Ecuador) enforces import documentation requirements including commercial invoice, packing list, and certificate of origin. Labels exclusively in Chinese, English, or other non-Spanish languages do not satisfy Ecuadorian requirements.
summary.zh: 在厄瓜多尔进口和销售无线或电信终端设备，须有在厄瓜多尔税务局（SRI）以RUC（统一纳税人登记号）注册的合法厄瓜多尔实体。该授权厄瓜多尔进口商或当地代表须在ARCOTEL型式认可申请档案上签署并承担产品在厄瓜多尔合规的法律责任。在厄瓜多尔销售的所有设备须贴附西班牙语标签；ARCOTEL型式认可证书编号须标注于产品标签或包装上。标签须标明产品型号、制造商或进口商、原产国及ARCOTEL核准编号。厄瓜多尔国家海关局（SENAE）执行进口文件要求，包括商业发票、装箱单和原产地证书。仅使用中文、英文或其他非西班牙语标签不满足厄瓜多尔要求。
summary.zht: 在厄瓜多進口和銷售無線或電信終端裝置，須有在厄瓜多稅務局（SRI）以RUC（統一納稅人登記號）登記的合法厄瓜多實體。該授權厄瓜多進口商或當地代表須在ARCOTEL型式認可申請檔案上簽署並承擔產品在厄瓜多合規的法律責任。在厄瓜多銷售的所有設備須貼附西班牙語標籤；ARCOTEL型式認可證書編號須標注於產品標籤或包裝上。標籤須標明產品型號、製造商或進口商、原產國及ARCOTEL核准編號。厄瓜多國家海關局（SENAE）執行進口文件要求，包括商業發票、裝箱單和原產地證書。僅使用中文、英文或其他非西班牙語標籤不滿足厄瓜多要求。

standards_or_laws: Ley Orgánica de Telecomunicaciones 2015 — requires authorized local representative for ARCOTEL homologación filings
SRI RUC registration — Registro Único de Contribuyentes; required for all legal entities importing or trading in Ecuador
ARCOTEL homologación dossier requirements — importer/representative signature and legal declaration
SENAE (Servicio Nacional de Aduana del Ecuador) — customs import documentation requirements
Ley Orgánica de Defensa del Consumidor and INEN labelling rules — Spanish-language product information requirements

summary.en: In China, consumer electronics and electrical products must display Simplified Chinese labelling including product model, manufacturer name and address, rated voltage and power, and the CCC certification mark and number where applicable. Chinese labelling standards are governed by GB 5296 series and mandatory CCC label requirements. For export, a Chinese exporter typically acts as the exporting party but an in-country distributor or importer is required in the destination market. Chinese export documentation for SENAE includes commercial invoice, packing list, and certificate of origin (required for duty purposes, particularly under any applicable Ecuador-China FTA preference claims).
summary.zh: 在中国，消费电子和电气产品须贴附简体中文标签，包含产品型号、制造商名称和地址、额定电压和功率，以及适用时的CCC认证标志和编号。中国标注标准由GB 5296系列和强制性CCC标签要求规范。出口时，中国出口商通常作为出口方，但目的地市场须有当地分销商或进口商。面向SENAE的中国出口文件包括商业发票、装箱单和原产地证书（关税用途，尤其在申请厄中自贸协定优惠税率时须提供）。
summary.zht: 在中國，消費電子和電氣產品須貼附簡體中文標籤，包含產品型號、製造商名稱和地址、額定電壓和功率，以及適用時的CCC認證標誌和編號。中國標注標準由GB 5296系列和強制性CCC標籤要求規範。出口時，中國出口商通常作為出口方，但目的地市場須有當地分銷商或進口商。面向SENAE的中國出口文件包括商業發票、裝箱單和原產地證書（關稅用途，尤其在申請厄中自由貿易協定優惠稅率時須提供）。

standards_or_laws: GB 5296 series — Chinese consumer product labelling standards (Simplified Chinese mandatory)
CCC label requirements — mandatory CCC mark and certificate number for in-scope products sold in China
China General Administration of Customs — export documentation requirements (commercial invoice, packing list, certificate of origin)

gap.en: Full gap: No Chinese-market documentation fulfils the Ecuadorian authorized importer / RUC registration requirement. A local Ecuadorian entity with a valid RUC/SRI tax registration must be established or engaged before an ARCOTEL homologación application can be filed. Chinese-language or English-language-only labels do not satisfy Ecuadorian requirements — Spanish-language labels with the ARCOTEL number, manufacturer/importer identity, product model, and country of origin must be applied. The ARCOTEL number cannot be placed on the label until the certificate is issued, so labelling must be planned as a post-homologación step. The Ecuador-China FTA (signed 2024, in ratification as of 2026) may reduce import duty when fully in force — a certificate of origin will be required to claim preferential tariff rates.
gap.zh: 完全差距：中国市场任何文件均无法满足厄瓜多尔授权进口商/RUC注册要求。在提交ARCOTEL型式认可申请前，须建立或聘用持有有效RUC/SRI税务登记的当地厄瓜多尔实体。仅使用中文或英文标签不满足厄瓜多尔要求——须加贴含ARCOTEL编号、制造商/进口商信息、产品型号及原产国的西班牙语标签。ARCOTEL编号须在取得证书后方可标注，因此标注须作为型式认可后步骤进行规划。厄中自贸协定（2024年签署，截至2026年仍在批准中）完全生效后可能降低进口关税——申请优惠关税税率时须提供原产地证书。
gap.zht: 完全差距：中國市場任何文件均無法滿足厄瓜多授權進口商/RUC登記要求。在提交ARCOTEL型式認可申請前，須建立或聘用持有有效RUC/SRI稅務登記的當地厄瓜多實體。僅使用中文或英文標籤不滿足厄瓜多要求——須加貼含ARCOTEL編號、製造商/進口商資訊、產品型號及原產國的西班牙語標籤。ARCOTEL編號須在取得證書後方可標注，因此標注須作為型式認可後步驟進行規劃。厄中自由貿易協定（2024年簽署，截至2026年仍在批准中）完全生效後可能降低進口關稅——申請優惠關稅稅率時須提供原產地證書。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — authorized Ecuadorian importer with RUC/SRI registration required for ARCOTEL homologación filing; Spanish-language label with ARCOTEL number required for all devices sold in Ecuador
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — Simplified Chinese labelling and CCC mark required for in-scope products sold in China under GB 5296 and CCC rules; Chinese exporter registration with customs required

source.publisher: ARCOTEL — Agencia de Regulación y Control de las Telecomunicaciones (Ecuador) / SRI — Servicio de Rentas Internas

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ecuador requires an authorized Ecuadorian importer with a valid RUC/SRI tax registration to file ARCOTEL homologación applications. Spanish-language labels with the ARCOTEL certificate number are mandatory on all wireless and telecom terminal equipment sold in Ecuador. Chinese-only or English-only labels do not comply. The ARCOTEL number must be obtained before the label can be finalised. Verify current ARCOTEL importer registration requirements, SENAE import documentation, and INEN labelling obligations with a qualified Ecuadorian regulatory professional before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 厄瓜多尔要求持有有效RUC/SRI税务登记的授权厄瓜多尔进口商提交ARCOTEL型式认可申请。所有在厄瓜多尔销售的无线及电信终端设备上须强制贴附含ARCOTEL证书编号的西班牙语标签。仅使用中文或英文标签不合规。ARCOTEL编号须在定稿标签前取得。发货前请向合格的厄瓜多尔监管专业人士核验现行ARCOTEL进口商注册要求、SENAE进口文件及INEN标注义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 厄瓜多要求持有有效RUC/SRI稅務登記的授權厄瓜多進口商提交ARCOTEL型式認可申請。所有在厄瓜多銷售的無線及電信終端裝置上須強制貼附含ARCOTEL證書編號的西班牙語標籤。僅使用中文或英文標籤不合規。ARCOTEL編號須在定稿標籤前取得。發貨前請向合格的厄瓜多監管專業人士核驗現行ARCOTEL進口商登記要求、SENAE進口文件及INEN標注義務。
